author: istefox
description: Capture web URLs as Markdown bookmarks in your vault, with og:image preview, AI-proposed tags, and AI-proposed destination subfolder. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.author: istefox
releases.description:
Patch release for the Obsidian community directory validator.

The duplicate-confirm button now takes its warning style from the native `mod-warning` CSS class instead of the deprecated `setWarning` API. No behavior change, and `minAppVersion` stays at 1.7.2.

Install: download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below into `<your vault>/.obsidian/plugins/bookmarker/`, then enable Bookmarker in Community Plugins.

releases.author: istefox
releases.description:
Patch release that clears the Obsidian community directory validator.

- Raises the minimum Obsidian version to 1.7.2, since the `Workspace.revealLeaf` API the board uses needs it.
- Reads the config folder from `vault.configDir` instead of a hardcoded `.obsidian` path.
- Smaller code-quality fixes flagged by the official plugin linter, plus an eslint setup so future releases stay clean.

No behavior change for users already on Obsidian 1.7.2 or newer.

Install: download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below into `<your vault>/.obsidian/plugins/bookmarker/`, then enable Bookmarker in Community Plugins.

releases.author: istefox
releases.description:
Patch release. Renames the plugin id from `obsidian-bookmarker` to `bookmarker` so the plugin meets the Obsidian community directory requirement: a plugin id cannot contain "obsidian".

Plugin behavior is unchanged from 0.1.0.

Upgrading from a manual 0.1.0 install: rename the plugin folder from `.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-bookmarker` to `.obsidian/plugins/bookmarker`, then reload Obsidian. New installs are unaffected.

Install: download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below into `<your vault>/.obsidian/plugins/bookmarker/`, then enable Bookmarker in Community Plugins.

releases.author: istefox
releases.description:
First public release of Bookmarker for Obsidian, a plugin that saves web pages into your vault as Markdown notes with a preview image, AI-proposed tags, and an AI-proposed destination folder. It runs on desktop and mobile and uses no backend of its own.

## Features

- One-click capture from a companion browser extension, from inside Obsidian, or from the iOS/iPad Share Sheet via an Apple Shortcut.
- A Claude classifier proposes tags and a destination subfolder, reusing the tags and folders already in your vault. An offline heuristic mode needs no API key.
- A review window to edit the title, tags, and folder before the note is written, or a silent one-click save when you turn it off.
- Preview images from the page's Open Graph, Twitter, or JSON-LD data, with a Microlink screenshot fallback and an optional wsrv.nl cache proxy. A cover picker lets you choose among candidates.
- A board view: a grid of cover cards with filters by tag, folder, domain, and type, plus a favorites flag.
- Duplicate awareness that blocks an exact re-save, flags a same-page tracking variant, and gives a quiet notice for other pages on the same domain.
- An on-demand broken-link checker that flags dead URLs in frontmatter, counting only 404/410 and network failures so anti-bot responses are left alone.
- Import from a Pocket, Raindrop, or browser HTML export, or from a Raindrop CSV.

## Install

The plugin is not in the community directory yet, so install it by hand:

1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from the assets below.
2. Copy the three files into `<your vault>/.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-bookmarker/`.
3. Enable Bookmarker in Community Plugins, then reload.

## Requirements

- Obsidian 1.5.0 or newer, desktop or mobile.
- An Anthropic API key for the Claude classifier. Optional: the heuristic mode runs offline.
- The obsidian-link-embed community plugin to render preview cards. Without it the note still saves with a fallback link.

See the README for the browser extension, the iOS Shortcut, settings, and privacy notes.
